form.formComment: Second-up. Comes off a 38-day let-up. First-up after four months made ground from midfield; 2nd of 9 at this track on March 5 over 229m, 0.8 len behind Js Fdd with 57.5kg at $7.70. Previously second-up 2nd of 10 at Will Rogers Downs on September 22 over 229m, 0.5 len behind Ms Relentless Streak with 57kg at $2.90. Must improve significantly.

form.formComment: Entire returning from a spell and has won previously when first up. Finished off last preparation second of 9 at The Albuquerque Downs Racetrack & Casino October 26 over 366m, a 0.1 lengths behind All Night Roc with 58kg at $2.40. Previously first up; third of 9 at The Albuquerque Downs Racetrack & Casino September 6 over 366m, 0.5 len behind Zooming Dynasty carrying 58kg at $9.40. Excellent chance.

form.formComment: Back after a long spell. Finished off last campaign ran last of 9 at Will Rogers Downs on October 19 over 101m, 2 len behind Windsome with 57kg at $46. form.formComment: Second-up today. Last start favourite; won by 1.3 len at this track March 8 over 320m defeating Jusk As Tempting carrying 56kg at $2.40. At only start last preparation favourite; won by a nose at Evangeline Downs November 21 over 366m defeating Chilley with 56kg at $1.70. No reason she cannot get the job done again. Improver with winning prospects.
